task_completion.description: Verify that RED Komodo cameras with serial numbers RED-KOM-002 and RED-KOM-005 were transferred from WH/Stock to WH/Out on Rent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Inventory or Transfers screen showing a validated internal transfer for RED-KOM-002 and RED-KOM-005 with the destination location 'WH/Out on Rent', or an inventory valuation showing these specific serial numbers in 'WH/Out on Rent'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 5 V-Mount Battery 98Wh units were transferred from WH/Stock to WH/Out on Rent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Inventory or Transfers screen showing a completed transfer of exactly 5 V-Mount batteries to the 'WH/Out on Rent' location.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Mixer with serial number SD-MIX-011 was returned from WH/Out on Rent to WH/Stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Inventory or Transfers screen showing SD-MIX-011 moved to 'WH/Stock' (or a transfer record indicating this move).

task_completion.description: Verify that 2 intact Boom Mics were returned from WH/Out on Rent to WH/Stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Inventory or Transfers screen showing a validated transfer of exactly 2 Boom Mics with the destination location 'WH/Stock'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 1 damaged Boom Mic was moved from WH/Out on Rent to WH/Maintenance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Inventory or Transfers screen showing a validated transfer of exactly 1 Boom Mic with the destination location 'WH/Maintenance'.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the inventory transfers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web application in a browser, with the user navigating through the Contacts and Inventory modules, rather than using terminal scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: Check that unrelated equipment belonging to other clients or unrequested stock was not moved.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no transfer records involving the Sony Venice camera (SNY-VEN-001), Mixer SD-MIX-012, or RED Komodos 001, 003, and 004.

integrity.description: Check that the results are genuine Odoo records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transfers should be visible as validated Odoo records with standard Odoo UI elements (breadcrumbs, status badges like 'Done'), not text files, terminal outputs, or manipulated HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Starlight Productions requires moving RED Komodos RED-KOM-002 and RED-KOM-005, plus 5 V-Mount batteries, from WH/Stock to WH/Out on Rent. Acme Corp requires returning Mixer SD-MIX-011 and 2 Boom Mics from WH/Out on Rent to WH/Stock, and 1 damaged Boom Mic to WH/Maintenance. Unmentioned items like RED Komodos 001, 003, 004, Mixer SD-MIX-012, and Sony Venice SNY-VEN-001 must remain in their original locations.
